sentences.text: RIPE returned nothing for two of the three ASNs — not expired registrations, not transferred allocations, nothing.
Completely unregistered autonomous systems advertising real routes in a live BGP feed should be impossible by every convention that makes the internet function.
But conventions are not enforcement mechanisms.
The third ASN — AS204796 — returned a RIPE registration dated September 2019 to an entity called Meridian Telemetry Group, with a PO Box in Reston, Virginia.
The contact email domain resolved to a Cloudflare-fronted page with a single sentence: "Meridian Telemetry provides network measurement services for institutional clients."
The log was stored locally, not in any production system, on hardware that belonged to him.
This was not a decision he made consciously.
It was something his hands did while his mind was still working out what he was looking at.
